description: Index of Rival One implementation guides under skills/catalog/. Validated by scripts/validate_catalog.py.

bundles.title: JWT authentication (HS512)
bundles.summary: Build or load the Bearer token (HS512 JWT with sub/group/user/apikey claims); same string is the WebSocket Authorization header and RequestData on Authorize (RequestType 45). Includes authorize response (Type 9) and auto-pushed messages on success.

bundles.title: WebSocket connection and heartbeat
bundles.summary: Endpoints (SIM/prod), open WSS with Authorization header, authorize (45), handle auto-pushed Types 13/14/15/38, then ping every 5 minutes. Includes TLS/corporate inspection notes.

bundles.title: Instrument search and market data
bundles.summary: Search (33), subscribe (0) on one shared WebSocket, demux all six market data response types (1/2/35/5/31/6). Includes options workflow (40) and CME sub-exchange names.

bundles.title: Send, revise, and cancel orders
bundles.summary: Send order (2) with float Quantity/Price, UserTicketSourceCode, ApiUserOrderId; revise (4); cancel variants (3/5/6/7); order status lifecycle (Type 8) with OrderStatus enum.

bundles.title: Common errors and diagnostics
bundles.summary: Auth failures (Type 9 IsAuthorized false), error response types (3/21/23), order rejections, subscription failures, diagnostics checklist. Includes exact error payloads.
